message:
refactor(wizard): update VPS provider recommendations and specs

Revise VPS provider list and recommended specifications based on
current pricing and performance requirements for agentic workflows.

Provider list changes:
- Remove Hetzner (no longer recommended as primary option)
- Reorder: Contabo first, then OVH (by value proposition)
- Update Contabo description:
  - New tagline: "Best value for high specs"
  - Highlight 32GB RAM for ~$35/month
  - Add "Instant activation" as a pro
  - Updated recommendation: Cloud VPS L (6 vCPU, 32GB RAM)
- Update OVH description:
  - New tagline: "Reliable, good support"
  - Add "Good customer support" and "Instant activation"
  - Updated recommendations: VPS Comfort (4 vCPU, 16GB) or
    VPS Elite (8 vCPU, 32GB)

Specification checklist updates:
- CPU: Changed "4-8 vCPU" to "6-8 vCPU" (higher minimum)
- RAM: Changed "8-16 GB" to "32 GB (minimum 16 GB)"
  Reflects that agentic workflows benefit from more memory
- Storage: Changed "100GB+" to "200GB+" NVMe SSD
  More headroom for models and project files
- Price: Changed "~$50/month sweet spot" to "$35-60/month"
  More accurate range reflecting current provider pricing

These changes reflect lessons learned from running multiple AI
agents simultaneously, where higher RAM (32GB) significantly
improves performance and reduces context window pressure.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
